mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, CONTENT ) VALUES ( SEQ_MESSAGE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{senderNo}, #{receiverNo}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT MESSAGE_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, CONTENT, TO_CHAR(SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DATE, READ_FL FROM MESSAGE WHERE RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY MESSAGE_NO DESC

SELECT MESSAGE_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, CONTENT, TO_CHAR(SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DATE, READ_FL FROM MESSAGE WHERE MESSAGE_NO = #{messageNo} AND (RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} OR SENDER_NO = #{memberNo})
SELECT MESSAGE_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, CONTENT, SEND_DATE, READ_FL FROM MESSAGE WHERE SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY SEND_DATE DESC
